  • Method Details

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public TradingExecutions.Builder accruedInterestAmount(AccruedInterestAmount accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of accrued interest exchanged in this execution. Will only be present for orders of Fixed Income assets.

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public TradingExecutions.Builder accruedInterestAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of accrued interest exchanged in this execution. Will only be present for orders of Fixed Income assets.

    • executedPrices

      public TradingExecutions.Builder executedPrices(List<TradingExecutedPrice> executedPrices)
      The prices at which the order was executed. For Equities: there will be one price measured in PRICE_PER_UNIT (using the order currency). For Fixed Income assets: there will always be an entry measured in the PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR (100 X cost / total par value), and there may be additional entries measured in yield.

    • executedPrices

      public TradingExecutions.Builder executedPrices(Optional<? extends List<TradingExecutedPrice>> executedPrices)
      The prices at which the order was executed. For Equities: there will be one price measured in PRICE_PER_UNIT (using the order currency). For Fixed Income assets: there will always be an entry measured in the PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR (100 X cost / total par value), and there may be additional entries measured in yield.

    • executedTime

      public TradingExecutions.Builder executedTime(OffsetDateTime executedTime)
      The timestamp that this fill was transacted at the market

    • executedTime

      public TradingExecutions.Builder executedTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> executedTime)
      The timestamp that this fill was transacted at the market

    • grossCreditAmount

      public TradingExecutions.Builder grossCreditAmount(GrossCreditAmount grossCreditAmount)
      The net currency amount exchanged in this transaction, in the order currency. Will only be present for orders of Fixed Income assets.

    • grossCreditAmount

      public TradingExecutions.Builder grossCreditAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends GrossCreditAmount> grossCreditAmount)
      The net currency amount exchanged in this transaction, in the order currency. Will only be present for orders of Fixed Income assets.

    • prevailingMarketPrice

      public TradingExecutions.Builder prevailingMarketPrice(PrevailingMarketPrice prevailingMarketPrice)
      The prevailing market price of the asset, without fees or commissions. Will only be present for orders of Fixed Income assets.

    • prevailingMarketPrice

      public TradingExecutions.Builder prevailingMarketPrice(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PrevailingMarketPrice> prevailingMarketPrice)
      The prevailing market price of the asset, without fees or commissions. Will only be present for orders of Fixed Income assets.

    • quantity

      public TradingExecutions.Builder quantity(Quantity quantity)
      The quantity of the order. For Equities: measured in shares. For Fixed Income assets: measured in the face value of the currency of the order.

    • quantity

      public TradingExecutions.Builder quantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Quantity> quantity)
      The quantity of the order. For Equities: measured in shares. For Fixed Income assets: measured in the face value of the currency of the order.

    • build

      public TradingExecutions build()
